title: in conversation update each response should be nested to the source comment
excerpt:
it is really confusing that the response to an update is not nested under the source comment but is put at the bottom. 
When there are many people and many comments, it is not possible to recognize who responded to what. …

posts.author: fabiozampieri (fabio zampieri)
posts.cookedHtml:
it is really confusing that the response to an update is not nested under the source comment but is put at the bottom.
When there are many people and many comments, it is not possible to recognize who responded to what.

perchè quando faccio reply la risposta non si nidifica?980×1233 143 KB
